ModMetaData.name: EasyRim - Overpowered Colony Enhancements
ModMetaData.author: Passion=Life
ModMetaData.description:
Make the Rim easier with deliberately overpowered colonist upgrades, faster production, and improved world-map mobility.
FEATURES - Transcendence: five enhancement branches, adaptive armor, nanite battle morphs, and emergency reconstruction after critical collapse. - Adaptive nexus spine: a craftable implant that distributes enhancement branches and dynamically responds to health, combat, genes, and equipment. - Brave Soul, Blood Essence Resonance, and Pioneer Spirit: powerful staged bonuses for combat, work, recovery, and survival. - Hero abilities: healing, execution, resurrection, universal bloodfeeding, world-target transit, drop pods, work guidance, and a colony-wide rally. - Buildings and crafting: an unattended solar auto drill, a buildable life-support power unit, batch components, neutroamine, synthread, and hyperweave. - Accelerated systems: biosculpter cycles, infinite chemreactor output, wastepack atomization, geothermal and ship-reactor power, plus deep scanning for tunneler mechs.
Most upgrades are delivered through Hediffs and Abilities. TraitDef currently contains no gameplay entries.
WARNING EasyRim is intentionally unbalanced and will significantly reduce the game's difficulty.
For RimWorld 1.6 (Odyssey). GitHub: https://github.com/ledshic/easyrim
